sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: FTIF Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:FTIF
feed.summary: This article provides an overview of the First Trust Bloomberg Inflation Sensitive Equity ETF (FTIF), detailing its current price, NAV, AUM, and performance metrics. It explains FTIF's investment strategy, which focuses on US equities in inflation-sensitive sectors like energy and real estate, and outlines its screening process using market capitalization, leverage, and inflation metrics. The article also includes technical analysis, seasonal trends, and a comprehensive FAQ section addressing common questions about ETFs and FTIF specifically.

feed.title: Chipotle expanding to Ajax. Here’s what we know
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill is set to open a new location in Ajax at the RioCan Durham Centre later this year, making it the second Chipotle in the Durham Region. This commercial center will also welcome an Olive Garden, marking the Italian chain's return to Ontario. The new Chipotle will be situated near an Indigo store.

feed.title: Sea-Doo Personal Watercraft: Power and Versatility on Water
feed.summary: The article highlights Sea-Doo personal watercraft as leaders in recreational water mobility, offering thrilling performance, innovative features, and reliability. Manufactured by BRP Inc., Sea-Doo models are known for their powerful Rotax engines, advanced hull designs, and integrated technology, appealing to a wide range of users from recreational riders to competitive athletes globally. They are also deployed in industrial and commercial sectors, and the brand maintains strong market relevance through continuous innovation and a vast global distribution network.
